message:
fix(render): update cell tests for GraphemeId generation-tracking API change

Adapt all GraphemeId::new() call sites in cell tests to the new 3-arg
signature (slot, generation, width) introduced by the generation-tracking
feature. Update grapheme_id_width_isolated_from_slot to use MAX_SLOT
constant instead of a hardcoded bitmask value.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
